Sputum Culture 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is a sputum culture? 
A sputum culture is a test that checks for bacteria or another type of germ that may be causing a respiratory tract infection (an infection in your lungs or airways). Sputum, also known as phlegm, is a thick type of mucus made in your lungs.
